scope: Chunk 4 - Phase 4 Arabic RTL polish regression

e2e_wrapper_triage.minimal_chromium_smoke: Pass - Chromium launched with escalation and opened http://localhost:5173/sign-in
e2e_wrapper_triage.playwright_config_external_mode: Pass - webServer remains disabled when E2E_BASE_URL is set, preserving Docker real-app mode without port conflicts
e2e_wrapper_triage.wrapper_classification: Harness limitation - i18n-audit and rtl-snapshots use mocked auth/data; wave_16_3_smoke is real-app oriented but stale for current seeded display names
e2e_wrapper_triage.sandbox_issue: Non-escalated Chromium launch failed with sandbox_host_linux.cc Operation not permitted

sign_in_ui_arabic.evidence: Signed in through UI with ?lng=ar; html and app shell were dir=rtl

invalid_sign_in_error.evidence: Arabic invalid-credentials message rendered without UUIDs, hostnames, driver strings, stacks, credentials, cookies, or raw payloads

user_connections_rbac.evidence: /api/v1/connections exposed source_analytics, MySQL Sakila, and MSSQL AdventureWorks to signed-in admin

admin_connections_health_introspection.evidence: Admin API confirmed all three required active rows healthy and schema_introspection_status=success

workspace_rtl_localization.evidence: Workspace rendered Arabic RTL with no raw i18n keys or unexpected English fallback outside allowed brand/technical strings

desktop_overflow.evidence: 1365px RTL viewport had no horizontal overflow

keyboard_tab.evidence: Database selector accepted focus and tab moved onward without trapping focus

history_admin_settings_mobile.evidence: After fix, History SQL/code computed direction is ltr; admin connections/forms, settings, invalid connection API, and mobile 375/768 checks completed
